notes: This plan only reports whether required command inputs are present; it never prints environment values.
Run first-public-RC evidence with CAIRN_ENV=production and production-like HTTPS origins where the artifact requires them.
status="ready" means local/generated capture prerequisites are present; it does not mean manual or provider-backed evidence has been captured.
Review pending_manual_evidence and pending_external_evidence before collecting artifacts, then run cairnid evidence check.

steps.name: operations_preflight
dependency_policy_check
operator_notes: Run from the repository root after installing the pinned dependency-security tools.
The generated receipt records tool versions, exit codes, and byte counts only; do not archive full audit stdout or stderr in release evidence.

steps.name: release_assets_verification
operator_notes: Verify the published GitHub Release assets, checksum file, release manifest, CycloneDX SBOMs, and GitHub provenance plus SBOM attestations before saving this token-free receipt.
Do not archive gh debug logs, request headers, cookies, tokens, or raw attestation payloads in this JSON artifact.

steps.command: save OpenID Foundation Config OP suite result JSON as openid-config-op-result.json
steps.name: openid_config_op_conformance
operator_notes: Export this artifact from the OpenID Foundation conformance suite after running the generated static-client plan.

Use `cairn-api conformance oidcc-result-template <config-op|basic-op>` to generate the token-free normalized published-result shape when archiving an official result URL instead of a full suite export.
Do not include static-client secrets, cookies, request headers, passwords, screenshots, or browser session data in normalized OpenID result summaries.

Run this command only against a production-like tenant prepared for state-changing release smoke.

required_environment.purpose: secondary raw SCIM token for rotation-window release evidence
retired or invalid raw SCIM token for rejection release evidence

steps.command: save normalized Okta connector smoke summary as scim-okta-connector-smoke.json
steps.name: scim_okta_connector_smoke
operator_notes: Record a normalized connector smoke summary after the external provisioning client completes the required provider-emitted SCIM create, update, deactivation, deletion, and token-rotation checks.
Keep SCIM Bulk proof in the built-in scim-smoke.json evidence; Okta and Microsoft Entra connector summaries do not require provider-emitted Bulk.
Use `cairn-api scim connector-smoke-template <okta|entra>` to generate the token-free JSON shape, then replace every placeholder with verified external connector evidence.
Do not include raw connector bearer tokens, provider credentials, end-user secrets, or provider console screenshots in this JSON artifact.
Run this command only against a production-like tenant prepared for state-changing release smoke.

steps.command: save normalized Microsoft Entra connector smoke summary as scim-entra-connector-smoke.json

Use `cairn-api scim connector-smoke-template <okta|entra>` to generate the token-free JSON shape, then replace every placeholder with verified external connector evidence.
Do not include raw connector bearer tokens, provider credentials, end-user secrets, or provider console screenshots in this JSON artifact.
Run this command only against a production-like tenant prepared for state-changing release smoke.
